title: Google’s NotebookLM can sum up your research in a TikTok-style clip
author: Emma Roth
raw_description: Google's NotebookLM is adding a new way to catch up on your notes: TikTok-style AI videos. The new feature is rolling out to Google AI Ultra and Pro subscribers, allowing NotebookLM to generate 60-second vertical AI clips based on the sources you upload to the app. The example shared by Google details Australia's unsuccessful war […]
summary: Google NotebookLM新增TikTok风格AI视频功能，可将用户上传的笔记自动生成为60秒竖屏视频摘要，面向AI Ultra和Pro订阅用户。
analysis_note: AI应用创新，提升笔记消费体验，但技术深度一般，偏向产品功能更新。
